title: SASC Advances Nominations of Abercrombie...
description: Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably the following Department of Defense civilian...
text:
Today, the Senate Armed Services Committee voted by voice en bloc to report out favorably the following Department of Defense civilian nominations:
-Ms. Cara L. Abercrombie to be Assistant Secretary of Defense for Acquisition
-Dr. Aprille J. Ericsson to be Assistant Secretary of Defense for Science and Technology
-Mr. Ronald T. Keohane to be Assistant Secretary of Defense for Manpower and Reserve Affairs
-Dr. Douglas C. Schmidt to be Director of Operational Test and Evaluation
The nominations were immediately reported to the floor following the Committee’s action.
